triage.title: sapstack Triage
triage.tagline: Describe the symptom · First-pass hints + operator escalation
triage.step2_hint: Write a short paragraph about what you were trying to do, and what message appeared. You don't need to know SAP terminology.
triage.step2_placeholder: Example: Ran F110 payment run, vendor 100234 alone failed with 'No valid payment method'. Was working yesterday.
triage.step3_summary_n: Found {n} matching symptoms, sorted by relevance.
triage.step3_no_match_help: Still need help? Use step 4 to forward your symptom to an operator as-is.
triage.step4_hint: If the hints above don't resolve your issue, forward the session-start payload to an operator. This portal does not connect to any SAP system.
triage.step4_payload_label: Payload to copy and share with the operator
triage.step4_privacy: 🔒 Privacy notice: Before copying, verify the payload does not contain any personal IDs, card numbers, or passwords.
triage.card_escalate: → Escalate this symptom to an operator
triage.warn_empty_symptom: Please enter at least one sentence describing the symptom.

session_viewer.title: sapstack Session Viewer
session_viewer.tagline: Share Evidence Loop session state read-only
session_viewer.load_hint: Drag the state.yaml file shared by an operator or click the file picker button.
